## How Has This Been Tested?

<!-- Describe what you tested and how to verify the change. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Self-review completed
- [ ] Code follows existing style guidelines
- [ ] Tests added / updated where applicable
- [ ] All existing tests pass
- [ ] Documentation updated where applicable
- [ ] `flutter analyze` passes with no errors
- [ ] Code generation re-run (`dart run build_runner build`) if models changed
- [ ] New screens are registered in `app_router.dart`
- [ ] Tested on at least one platform (iOS / Android / Web)
- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed
